title: 64-bit SWAR popcount
summary: Counts the set bits in a 64-bit word using a classic SWAR reduction.
contract: Returns the number of one bits in the input as an integer in the inclusive range [0, 64].

title: Compute the sign mask of a 32-bit integer (-1/0)
summary: Computes a sign mask for a 32-bit integer, returning -1 for negative inputs and 0 otherwise.
contract: Returns -1 when the input is negative and 0 when the input is zero or positive.

title: Compute the sign of a 32-bit integer (-1/+1)
summary: Computes the sign of a 32-bit integer, returning -1 for negative inputs and +1 otherwise.
contract: Returns -1 when the input is negative and +1 when the input is zero or positive.

title: Compute the signum of a 32-bit integer (-1/0/+1)
summary: Computes the signum of a 32-bit integer, returning -1 for negatives, 0 for zero, and +1 for positives.
contract: Returns -1 when the input is negative, 0 when the input is zero, and +1 when the input is positive.

title: Test whether a 32-bit integer is non-negative (0/1)
summary: Tests whether a 32-bit integer is non-negative, returning 1 for zero or positives and 0 for negatives.
contract: Returns 0 when the input is negative and 1 when the input is zero or positive.
